item.title: Version 2.5.1
item.description: ### Fixed - **Collections view layout.** The Collections sidebar entry rendered with a second, nested sidebar inside the BrewStore detail pane — on narrow window widths the inner list was squashed to a few pixels and the "No collection selected" placeholder got clipped. Replaced the inner `NavigationSplitView` with a flat `HStack` split so Collections now looks consistent with the other BrewStore sections (Orphans, Doctor, Update History). - **Homebrew tap cask** declares `uninstall delete: "#{HOMEBREW_PREFIX}/bin/autobrew"` so upgrades and reinstalls clean up the `autobrew` CLI symlink even when the source `.app` has already been moved to the Caskroom backup. Before this fix, brew aborted mid-upgrade with `It seems the symlink source '/Applications/AutoBrew.app/Contents/Helpers/autobrew' is not there`. The change is in the [tap repo](https://github.com/marcelrgberger/homebrew-tap) and reached users on the next `brew update`.
